org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser

Class FileListFragment

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.support.v4.app.Fragment
      • android.support.v4.app.ListFragment
        • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser.FileListFragment
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ComponentCallbacks, android.support.v4.app.LoaderManager.LoaderCallbacks<List<File>>, android.view.View.OnCreateContextMenuListener

    public class FileListFragment
extends android.support.v4.app.ListFragment
implements android.support.v4.app.LoaderManager.LoaderCallbacks<List<File>>
    Fragment that displays a list of Files in a given path.

    The path to open at startup should be stored in the argument with the name "path".

    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

      • newInstance

        public static FileListFragment newInstance(File path,
                           FileFilter fileFilter,
                           FileChooserIconSelector iconSelector)
        Parameters:
        path - is the he absolute path of the file (directory) to display.
        fileFilter - is the file filter to use.
        iconSelector - is the selector of icon.
        Returns:
        the new instance.
